issue_summary: Differentiate between OTHER & "unknown" in JRE & OS enums
javadoc_before:
/**
 * Enumeration of Java Runtime Environment versions.
 *
 * @since 5.1
 * @see EnabledOnJre
 * @see DisabledOnJre
 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Enumeration of Java Runtime Environment (JRE) versions. * *

If the current JRE version cannot be detected — for example, if the * {@code java.version} JVM system property is undefined — then none of * the constants defined in this enum will be considered to be the * {@linkplain #isCurrentVersion current JRE version}. * * @since 5.1 * @see EnabledOnJre * @see DisabledOnJre */
